subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the Covenant! Thy letters, ablaze with the fire of the love of God, have reached me, along with news from Petersburg and Moscow [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب میثاق تحاریر آنمشتعل بنار محبت الله واصل و اخبار پطرسبورغ و مسکو
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @praise and encouragement, @growth of the Cause
